abstract: Framework-agnostic file upload, download, and serving patterns for Tigris object storage. Covers Next.js (Server Actions, API Routes, next/image), Remix (actions, loaders, resource routes), Express (Multer, streaming), Rails (Active Storage), Django (django-storages with tigris-boto3-ext), and Laravel (Storage facade). Includes client-side direct uploads, presigned URLs, multipart uploads with progress, and deployment configuration.
